name: Google Calendar
description: Sync Google Calendar events and meeting metadata into the Shielva knowledge base.

install_fields.label: OAuth Client ID
install_fields.help: From Google Cloud Console → APIs & Services → Credentials → OAuth 2.0 Client IDs

install_fields.label: OAuth Client Secret
install_fields.help: The client secret from your OAuth 2.0 Client ID

install_fields.label: Redirect URI
install_fields.help: Must match exactly what is registered in Google Cloud Console

apis.name: Install Connector
apis.description: Validates client_id and client_secret and marks the connector as installed. Call before OAuth authorization.

apis.name: Authorize (OAuth Code Exchange)
apis.description: Exchanges an OAuth2 authorization code for access and refresh tokens.

apis.name: Health Check
apis.description: Verifies Google Calendar API connectivity by fetching the primary calendar.

apis.name: Sync Events
apis.description: Syncs upcoming calendar events (next 30 days) from the primary calendar into the Shielva knowledge base.

apis.name: List Calendars
apis.description: Returns all calendars accessible to the authenticated user.

apis.name: List Events
apis.description: Lists events in a calendar within an optional time range.

apis.name: Get Event
apis.description: Fetches a single calendar event by calendar_id and event_id.
